evals.prompt: Edit this homepage hero: 'At Acme, we leverage best-in-class solutions to enable optimization of your marketing operations through our innovative platform.'
evals.expected_output: Should run through all 5 editing passes on this copy. Should identify: jargon ('leverage,' 'best-in-class,' 'innovative'), passive voice, abstract nouns ('enable optimization of'), and weak opener ('At Acme'). Should produce a cleaner, specific, outcome-focused rewrite. Should provide edit summary explaining changes.
assertions: Replaces abstract nouns with concrete verbs
